framework: UNESCO AI Competency Framework for Teachers (AI-CFT) 2024
note: Performance-based competency mapping. Strength is a ceiling on observed evidence_strength. Scorer must add item-specific rationale and confidence.

WS1_B1.rationale: Learner recalls or explains foundational supervised-learning vocabulary. Item targets core terminology (object, feature, label, threshold, rule, confusion-matrix terms, or decision-tree structure).
